goal: Industrial-assembler persona: Franka with a simulated driver bit drives an M3-M6 class cylindrical screw into a tapped plate using a CONTINUOUS HELICAL DESCENT (coupled Z-translation + Z-rotation under cartesian_impedance compliance). Z-force capped at 15 N to prevent stripping; wrist torque capped at ~1 N·m (M3-M6 fastener class). Success: screw.translate.z below the plate-top flush threshold AND get_joint_torques wrist sample reaches the torque cap within tolerance window. Realizes ONET SOC 51-9061 yrkesroll industrial-screw-driving-impedance-001.
thoughts: Distinction from CP-NEW-bottle-cap-tighten: bottle-cap is pick→align→press→twist (linear descent THEN rotational seat as separate phases). Screw-driving is CONTINUOUS HELICAL DESCENT — translation and rotation are coupled along the screw axis through every waypoint, not separated into a press phase + a twist phase.

Distinction from CP-NEW-peg-bushing-impedance: peg-bushing terminates at force-cap with no rotation. Screw-driving terminates at torque-cap (wrist torque reaches M3-M6 fastener-class limit) AND z below flush.
Distinction from CP-NEW-assembly-constraint-verify: this canonical exercises live impedance + torque/force feedback through the entire helical descent, not pre-flight constraint validation.

Workpiece topology: tapped plate = solid Cube acting as plate body + a Cylinder negative-space proxy (placed inside the plate volume to represent the tapped hole — solid geometry only, no boolean subtraction). Screw = narrow + long Cylinder (M5 reference: radius=0.0025 m, height=0.025 m).

M3-M6 fastener class: typical seating torque 0.5-2.0 N·m. We pick 1.0 N·m as the torque cap (lower than bottle-cap's 2.0 N·m which targets finger-tight cap-on-bottle). Z-force cap 15 N (lower than bottle-cap 20 N) — reflects the smaller bit/screw contact patch and avoids cross-threading.

Compliance mode cartesian_impedance with COUPLED translational + rotational stiffness: Kx=[300,300,40] N/m (X/Y stiff for axis centering, Z very soft to allow descent under force-cap), Kr=[20,20,8] N·m/rad (X/Y rotational stiff to prevent tilt, Z rotational soft to allow the driver bit to slip as torque builds).

Helical trajectory: 6 waypoints from t=0 to t=1. Each waypoint decreases z by ~3 mm AND advances orientation by 90° around the screw Z-axis (≈ a 360° rotation per ~12 mm of descent, approximating an M5 thread pitch of 0.8 mm — coarse but enough to exercise the coupled motion). compliance_handoff_at=0.0 — the entire descent runs under compliance because every waypoint is contact-rich.

Trajectory waypoint dicts use 'pose' (position + orientation quaternion). Phase 63b accepts pose-only; cuRobo replan is gated so this is a pure compliance-controlled motion, not a planned cartesian path.

Success probes: get_world_transform(screw) — z must be ≤ plate_top_z - 0.005 (5 mm below flush); get_joint_torques(franka) — wrist7 torque sample must reach torque_threshold within ±20% (tolerance window prevents both under-driving and stripping); monitor_joint_effort streams wrist torque history for diagnostic timeline.
Force/torque sensor at panda_hand with threshold=15.0 N for Z-axis force cap; complements the joint-torque probe (the wrist joint torque is the seating signal, the F/T sensor is the safety cap).

setup_impedance_controller dry_run=True — no live torque-mode control without a ros2_control bridge; same risk as all CRM-B1 canonicals. follow_trajectory_with_compliance dry_run=True returns a plan dict.

motion_controllers: cartesian_impedance via follow_trajectory_with_compliance (helical descent, untested) + impedance via setup_impedance_controller (controller install, untested). No cuRobo — screw is pre-positioned at the hole entry, the helical descent is the entire motion.
code:
# ── Scene skeleton ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

# Worktable
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.6, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# ── Robot ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

# ── Tapped plate (plate body — solid Cube) ───────────────────────────────────
create_prim(
    prim_path="/World/TappedPlate",
    prim_type="Cube",
    position=[0, -0.25, 0.78],
    scale=[0.08, 0.08, 0.012],
)
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/TappedPlate", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/TappedPlate", attr_name="physics:approximation", value="convexHull")

# ── Tapped hole (negative-space proxy — narrow Cylinder co-located inside plate) ──
# Solid geometry only; no boolean subtraction. This cylinder marks the hole
# centerline and provides a contact target for the screw tip during descent.
create_prim(
    prim_path="/World/TappedHole",
    prim_type="Cylinder",
    position=[0, -0.25, 0.78],
    radius=0.003,
    height=0.024,
)
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/TappedHole", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/TappedHole", attr_name="physics:approximation", value="convexHull")

# ── Screw (narrow + long Cylinder, dynamic, M5-class reference dimensions) ────
# Initial pose: tip just above the hole entrance, axis aligned with world +Z.
create_prim(
    prim_path="/World/Screw",
    prim_type="Cylinder",
    position=[0, -0.25, 0.808],
    radius=0.0025,
    height=0.025,
)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Screw", schema_name=api)
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/Screw", attr_name="physics:mass", value=0.005)

apply_physics_material(prim_path="/World/Screw", material_name="steel")

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=["/World/Screw"],
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)
bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=["/World/Screw", "/World/TappedHole"],
    attr="physxRigidBody:solverPositionIterationCount",
    value=16,
)

# ── Force / torque sensor — 15 N Z-force cap, anti-strip safety ──────────────
add_force_torque_sensor(
    sensor_path="/World/Franka/FtSensor",
    parent_path="/World/Franka/panda_hand",
    threshold=15.0,
    noise_std=0.03,
)

# ── Impedance controller — coupled translational + rotational stiffness ──────
# X/Y translational STIFF (centering); Z translational SOFT (descent under F-cap).
# X/Y rotational STIFF (no tilt); Z rotational SOFT (driver bit slip as torque builds).
setup_impedance_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_frame="panda_hand",
    Kx=[300.0, 300.0, 40.0],
    Kr=[20.0, 20.0, 8.0],
    Dx=[30.0, 30.0, 6.0],
    Dr=[2.5, 2.5, 1.2],
    null_space_stiffness=0.5,
    null_space_damping=0.5,
    torque_mode=True,
    dry_run=True,
)

# ── Compliance params — explicit Cartesian stiffness for helical descent ─────
set_compliance_params(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    stiffness_xyz=[300.0, 300.0, 40.0],
    damping_xyz=[30.0, 30.0, 6.0],
    stiffness_rot=[20.0, 20.0, 8.0],
    damping_rot=[2.5, 2.5, 1.2],
    dry_run=True,
)

# ── Joint-effort monitor (records wrist torque history during descent) ───────
monitor_joint_effort(
    articulation_path="/World/Franka",
    duration_seconds=30.0,
)

# ── Helical descent trajectory (6 waypoints, coupled Δz + Δrz per step) ──────
# t=0 .. t=1, compliance_handoff_at=0.0 → entire trajectory under cartesian_impedance.
# Each step: z decreases ~3 mm, orientation advances 90° about screw Z-axis.
# Total descent ≈ 15 mm, total rotation ≈ 450° (~1.25 turns).
follow_trajectory_with_compliance(
    trajectory=[
        {"pose": {"position": [0, -0.25, 0.815], "orientation": [1.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0]}},
        {"pose": {"position": [0, -0.25, 0.812], "orientation": [0.9239, 0.0, 0.0, 0.3827]}},
        {"pose": {"position": [0, -0.25, 0.809], "orientation": [0.7071, 0.0, 0.0, 0.7071]}},
        {"pose": {"position": [0, -0.25, 0.806], "orientation": [0.3827, 0.0, 0.0, 0.9239]}},
        {"pose": {"position": [0, -0.25, 0.803], "orientation": [0.0, 0.0, 0.0, 1.0]}},
        {"pose": {"position": [0, -0.25, 0.800], "orientation": [-0.3827, 0.0, 0.0, 0.9239]}}
    ],
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    compliance_handoff_at=0.0,
    compliance_controller="cartesian_impedance",
    timeout_s=30.0,
    velocity_scaling=0.2,
    dry_run=True,
)

# ── Success probes ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
get_world_transform(prim_path="/World/Screw")
get_world_transform(prim_path="/World/TappedPlate")
get_joint_torques(articulation="/World/Franka")
extension_notes: Implements ONET SOC 51-9061 industrial-assembler persona (M3-M6 fastener class). Key differentiators from CP-NEW-bottle-cap-tighten: (1) CONTINUOUS HELICAL DESCENT — translation and rotation are coupled through every trajectory waypoint, not separated into a press phase + twist phase. (2) Lower force cap (15 N vs 20 N) and lower torque cap (~1 N·m vs 2 N·m) reflecting the smaller M3-M6 screw class. (3) compliance_handoff_at=0.0 — the entire trajectory runs under cartesian_impedance because every waypoint is contact-rich. (4) Compliance stiffness profile couples translational + rotational soft-axes (Z translation + Z rotation both soft for descent and driver-bit slip; X/Y rigid for centering). Tapped hole is a Cylinder negative-space proxy (no boolean subtraction) co-located inside the plate Cube. PhysX numerical instability during screw grip is a shared risk with all impedance canonicals.
failure_modes: PhysX numerical instability: screw velocity spikes during Franka grip — 5 g screw mass + solver_position_iteration_count=16 + steel material partially mitigates; not eliminated.

Tapped hole is a solid Cylinder proxy (no boolean subtraction) — screw cannot enter the volume in PhysX; helical descent terminates on contact with the hole-top surface, not true thread engagement. Torque-stop signal is the F/T sensor + joint-torque probe, not mesh penetration.
setup_impedance_controller and set_compliance_params are dry_run=True — no live torque-mode control without a ros2_control bridge; production rollout requires setup_ros2_control_compat first.

follow_trajectory_with_compliance is Phase 63b — trajectory waypoint dicts must contain joint_positions OR pose; pose-only is accepted but cuRobo replan is gated. With compliance_handoff_at=0.0 the entire trajectory is treated as the compliant suffix; the bridge accepts this configuration but emits no handoff_mismatch_warning.

compliance_controller='cartesian_impedance' is enum-validated by COMPLIANCE_MODE_ENUM; fallback to 'admittance' loses the coupled translational+rotational stiffness profile and degrades to position-mode compliance.

M3-M6 torque-class assumption: 1.0 N·m cap is the midpoint of the 0.5-2.0 N·m range; M3 screws (recommended ≤ 0.6 N·m) will trip the cap before flush, M6 screws (recommended ≥ 1.5 N·m) will not reach the cap and read as 'under-seated'. Per-fastener-class tuning required for production.

monitor_joint_effort threshold_nm=1.0 mirrors the torque cap — if the controller observes wrist torque exceeding 1.0 N·m before the screw reaches flush, the operator interpretation is 'cross-thread' not 'seated'; ambiguity is resolved by combining the joint-torque sample with get_world_transform(screw).z below the flush threshold.
verified_status: drafted-2026-05-16; form-gate-schema ⏳ pending lint; function-gate ⏳ Kit RPC + ros2_control bridge
code_template:
# ── Scene skeleton ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.6, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# ── Robot ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
robot_wizard(
    robot_name={{primary_robot.class}},
    dest_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    position={{primary_robot.position}},
    orientation={{primary_robot.orientation}},
)

# ── Tapped plate + hole proxy ────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(
    prim_path={{tapped_plate.path}},
    prim_type="Cube",
    position={{tapped_plate.position}},
    scale={{tapped_plate.scale}},
)
apply_api_schema(prim_path={{tapped_plate.path}}, schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
set_attribute(prim_path={{tapped_plate.path}}, attr_name="physics:approximation", value="convexHull")

create_prim(
    prim_path={{tapped_hole.path}},
    prim_type="Cylinder",
    position={{tapped_hole.position}},
    radius={{tapped_hole.radius}},
    height={{tapped_hole.height}},
)
apply_api_schema(prim_path={{tapped_hole.path}}, schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
set_attribute(prim_path={{tapped_hole.path}}, attr_name="physics:approximation", value="convexHull")

# ── Screw ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(
    prim_path={{screw.path}},
    prim_type="Cylinder",
    position={{screw.position}},
    radius={{screw.radius}},
    height={{screw.height}},
)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{screw.path}}, schema_name=api)
set_attribute(prim_path={{screw.path}}, attr_name="physics:mass", value={{screw.mass_kg}})
apply_physics_material(prim_path={{screw.path}}, material_name="steel")
bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=[{{screw.path}}],
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)
bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=[{{screw.path}}, {{tapped_hole.path}}],
    attr="physxRigidBody:solverPositionIterationCount",
    value=16,
)

# ── FT sensor ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
add_force_torque_sensor(
    sensor_path={{ft_sensor.path}},
    parent_path={{ft_sensor.parent_path}},
    threshold={{ft_sensor.threshold}},
    noise_std=0.03,
)

# ── Impedance controller (coupled Kx + Kr soft-Z profile) ────────────────────
setup_impedance_controller(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    target_frame="panda_hand",
    Kx=[300.0, 300.0, 40.0],
    Kr=[20.0, 20.0, 8.0],
    Dx=[30.0, 30.0, 6.0],
    Dr=[2.5, 2.5, 1.2],
    null_space_stiffness=0.5,
    null_space_damping=0.5,
    torque_mode=True,
    dry_run=True,
)

set_compliance_params(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    stiffness_xyz=[300.0, 300.0, 40.0],
    damping_xyz=[30.0, 30.0, 6.0],
    stiffness_rot=[20.0, 20.0, 8.0],
    damping_rot=[2.5, 2.5, 1.2],
    dry_run=True,
)

# ── Joint-effort monitor (records wrist torque history) ──────────────────────
monitor_joint_effort(
    articulation_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    duration_seconds=30.0,
)

# ── Helical descent: coupled Δz + Δrz per waypoint, full trajectory compliant ─
follow_trajectory_with_compliance(
    trajectory=[
        {"pose": {"position": [0, -0.25, 0.815], "orientation": [1.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0]}},
        {"pose": {"position": [0, -0.25, 0.812], "orientation": [0.9239, 0.0, 0.0, 0.3827]}},
        {"pose": {"position": [0, -0.25, 0.809], "orientation": [0.7071, 0.0, 0.0, 0.7071]}},
        {"pose": {"position": [0, -0.25, 0.806], "orientation": [0.3827, 0.0, 0.0, 0.9239]}},
        {"pose": {"position": [0, -0.25, 0.803], "orientation": [0.0, 0.0, 0.0, 1.0]}},
        {"pose": {"position": [0, -0.25, 0.800], "orientation": [-0.3827, 0.0, 0.0, 0.9239]}}
    ],
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    compliance_handoff_at=0.0,
    compliance_controller="cartesian_impedance",
    timeout_s=30.0,
    velocity_scaling=0.2,
    dry_run=True,
)

# ── Success probes ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
get_world_transform(prim_path={{screw.path}})
get_world_transform(prim_path={{tapped_plate.path}})
get_joint_torques(articulation={{primary_robot.path}})
